summary: Formalized preview publication into a native business-fact lane and a custom-frontend supplement lane
Locked model/menu/action truth to the native business-fact layer
Removed the abandoned native portal frontend from the preview usability acceptance target

notes: No business semantic, ACL, or frontend behavior change
Clarifies future implementation ownership and acceptance boundaries

next_suggestion: Use the native menu/action anchors to drive the next custom-frontend implementation batch for portal-style preview entries.
